summary: Phase 7A-7B Features Testing Complete. Backend: 37/37 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All Phase 7 tabs verified across Admin, Case Manager, and Client dashboards.
critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 7A-7B APIs working correctly with proper role-based access control
Case Timeline: GET /api/timeline/case/{case_id} returns events (steps, docs, chats, transfers, notes) - PASS
Case Notes CRUD: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/case-notes, GET /api/case-notes/case/{id} - PASS
Canned Responses CRUD: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/canned-responses, POST /{id}/use - PASS
Referral CRUD: POST/GET /api/referrals, PUT /{id}/status, GET /stats - PASS
Happiness Score Widget: data-testid='happiness-score-widget' renders on Admin dashboard (100% Excellent, 5/5 avg)
Admin Dashboard: Referral Program, Client Greetings, Canned Responses tabs in TOOLS section (collapsed by default)
Admin Dashboard: Conversion Funnel, Country & Product, Commission Analytics tabs in SALES & FINANCE section
Case Manager Dashboard: Canned Responses tab in TOOLS section, Case Notes & Timeline in case detail view
Client Dashboard: Refer a Friend, Case Timeline, Rate Experience tabs in sidebar
seed_data_creation: Created test referrals, canned responses, case notes, tags, and greetings via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7A-7B features fully tested and working. All new features verified: Case Timeline (with event filters), Case Notes & Tags (CRUD with colors and pinning), Canned Responses (CRUD with shortcuts and usage tracking), Referral Program (CRUD with status updates and stats), Client Greetings (templates and custom messages), Conversion Funnel (4-stage visualization), Country/Product Analytics (by country and product views), Commission Analytics (partner breakdown and monthly trend), Language Toggle (English/Hindi), Happiness Score Widget (NPS display). Admin TOOLS section is collapsed by default - need to expand to see Referral Program, Client Greetings, Canned Responses tabs.

case_timeline.get_timeline: PASS - Returns events with type, title, timestamp, color, icon
case_timeline.event_types: PASS - step_started, step_completed, document_uploaded, chat_message, case_transfer, note_added, case_created
case_timeline.filter_chips: PASS - UI shows filter chips for event types

language_toggle.english_hindi: PASS - Toggles between English and Hindi

frontend_dashboards.admin_dashboard: PASS - Happiness Score Widget, Conversion Funnel, Country & Product, Commission Analytics visible
frontend_dashboards.admin_tools_section: PASS - Canned Responses, Referral Program, Client Greetings tabs (in collapsed TOOLS section)
frontend_dashboards.cm_dashboard: PASS - Canned Responses tab, Case Notes & Timeline in case detail
frontend_dashboards.client_dashboard: PASS - Refer a Friend, Case Timeline, Rate Experience tabs

mocked_services.email_service: MOCKED - Resend API falls back to console logging (no RESEND_API_KEY configured)
